Metadata.defaultDescription: 多租户度假村网站，支持预订流程、BFF API，并可用于生产环境。
Metadata.tenantFallbackDescription: 当前路径没有可用的租户数据。

NotFound.title: 未找到租户
NotFound.description: 请检查 URL 格式是否为 /site/your-tenant-slug

TenantPage.serviceUnavailable: 服务暂时不可用，请稍后再试。
TenantPage.loadErrorTitle: 无法加载此度假村页面。

ResortHome.highlightDescription: 该租户体验的独特之处。
ResortHome.statsEmpty: 当前无法显示统计数据。
ResortHome.roomsDescription: 选择最适合您入住的房型。
ResortHome.roomsEmpty: 当前所选入住日期暂无可用房型。请尝试更改日期或联系我们获取帮助。
ResortHome.roomsIntroDescription: Choose the room style that fits your stay, with a relaxing resort atmosphere and practical comfort.

deluxe-king-bed.title: DELUXE KING BED
deluxe-king-bed.subtitle: 30 SQUARE METERS OF SPACE
deluxe-king-bed.description: Deluxe King Bed is a private room, designed for a single guest or a couple. Equipped with a king-sized bed, comfortable bedding, and great amenities.

deluxe-twin-bed.title: DELUXE TWIN BED
deluxe-twin-bed.subtitle: 30 SQUARE METERS OF SPACE
deluxe-twin-bed.description: Deluxe Twin Room is a spacious room with two separate beds. This room is ideal for couples or friends who wish to stay in the same room.

deluxe-triple-room.title: DELUXE TRIPLE ROOM
deluxe-triple-room.subtitle: 32 SQUARE METERS OF SPACE
deluxe-triple-room.description: A comfortable room designed for small groups or families, with practical space and relaxing resort-style atmosphere.

private-villa.title: PRIVATE VILLA
private-villa.subtitle: RELAXING PRIVATE SPACE
private-villa.description: A private villa-style stay with a peaceful atmosphere, ideal for guests who want comfort, privacy, and a premium resort experience.

security.title: Security
security.description: Security system and CCTV coverage for guest peace of mind.

laundry.title: Laundry service
laundry.description: Laundry and dry-cleaning service for guest convenience.

shuttle.title: Shuttle service
shuttle.description: Guest transfer service based on resort conditions.

wifi.title: Wi-Fi internet
wifi.description: Wireless internet access in designated guest areas.

breakfast.title: Breakfast
breakfast.description: Breakfast service based on selected package.

support.title: Guest support
support.description: Our team is ready to support your stay and provide information.

staticText.forestHeroTitle: Beautiful resort website with booking flow
staticText.forestHeroSubtitle: Template for resorts that need a professional website, brand flexibility, and backend integration.
staticText.lakeHeroTitle:
Lake Serenity Resort
Stay relaxed, enjoy the morning view
staticText.lakeHeroSubtitle: One template, ready for per-tenant branding.
staticText.demoHeroEyebrow: Demo tenant for preview and QA
staticText.demoHeroSubtitle: This tenant is intended for testing, stakeholder demos, and staging previews.
staticText.footerDescription: Resort website with booking flow, multi-owner support, and backend integration.
staticText.roomGardenVillaDescription: A private garden villa, quiet and ideal for couples or small families.
staticText.roomMountainCabinDescription: Warm mountain-view cabin with a relaxing private balcony.
staticText.roomRiverPoolVillaDescription: Riverside pool villa with private pool, ideal for group trips.
staticText.roomLakesideSuiteDescription: Lakeside room with morning mist views and waterside breakfast ambience.
staticText.roomWoodenVillaDescription: Contemporary wooden villa focused on warmth and privacy.

mediaModal.activityFallbackDetail: More details will be available soon.

LeadForm.placeholderMessage: 请告诉我们您偏好的房型和需求...
LeadForm.validationSummary: 提交前请先修正验证错误。
LeadForm.errorCheckInInvalid: 入住日期格式必须为 YYYY-MM-DD
LeadForm.errorCheckOutInvalid: 退房日期格式必须为 YYYY-MM-DD
LeadForm.errorDateOrder: 退房日期必须晚于入住日期

RoomSearchModal.emptyTitle: No rooms available for selected dates
RoomSearchModal.emptyMessage: Please choose different check-in dates or contact the resort for assistance.
RoomSearchModal.errorTitle: We cannot search rooms right now
RoomSearchModal.errorMessage: Please try again or contact the resort directly.
RoomSearchModal.validationCheckInFormat: Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD.

network_issue.title: Network connection is unavailable
network_issue.message: Please check your internet connection and try again.
network_issue.help: If your connection is stable but this page still cannot load, please retry in a moment.

temporary_unavailable.title: This resort page is temporarily unavailable
temporary_unavailable.message: The service may be experiencing a short-term issue. Please try again shortly.
temporary_unavailable.help: You can retry now or return to the homepage.

maintenance.title: This service is under maintenance
maintenance.message: We are currently updating the system. Thank you for your patience.

backend_unavailable.title: Resort data is temporarily unavailable
backend_unavailable.message: We could not retrieve resort information right now. Please retry or contact the resort directly.
backend_unavailable.help: Support can help confirm booking and room details while the service recovers.

not_found.title: We can't find this page
not_found.message: The page may have been moved, removed, or is not available.
not_found.help: Please return to the homepage and continue browsing from there.

generic_error.title: Something went wrong
generic_error.message: Please try again. If this continues, contact the resort for help.
generic_error.help: This notice keeps your information safe while we recover the page.
